\tzpentry{ID4525}{Opera Omnia Vol Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4525 introduces Opera Omnia Vol Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ u_T := \int_{\Gamma} \sqrt{\lvert g\rvert}\,\mathrm{d}\ell, \]
